title_zh: olmo-eval：模型开发循环的评估工作平台
title_en: olmo-eval: An evaluation workbench for the model development loop
summary_zh: olmo-eval是一个专为模型开发循环设计的评估工作平台，旨在帮助AI开发者更高效地测试和优化模型性能。该平台集成多种评估工具，支持快速迭代和结果比较，提升模型研发效率。
summary_en: olmo-eval is an evaluation workbench designed for the model development loop, helping AI developers efficiently test and optimize model performance. It integrates multiple evaluation tools to support rapid iteration and result comparison, enhancing model research productivity.
why_it_matters_zh: 在快速发展的AI领域，模型迭代频繁且复杂。olmo-eval为开发者提供系统化的评测手段，降低开发难度，加快研发进程。
why_it_matters_en: With rapid advancements in AI, frequent and complex model iterations are common. olmo-eval offers developers systematic evaluation tools, reducing development difficulty and speeding up the research process.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: olmo-eval: An evaluation workbench for the model development loop. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

summary_zh: OpenAI计划收购Ona，以通过安全、持久的云环境扩展Codex，实现跨企业工作流程的长时间运行AI代理。

title_zh: PyTorch 性能剖析（第二部分）：从 nn.Linear 到融合的多层感知器
title_en: Profiling in PyTorch (Part 2): From nn.Linear to a Fused MLP
summary_zh: 本文介绍了如何使用 PyTorch 的性能剖析工具，从简单的 nn.Linear 模块开始，逐步优化到融合的多层感知器（MLP），以提升模型运行效率。
summary_en: This article demonstrates how to use PyTorch's profiling tools, starting from a simple nn.Linear module and progressively optimizing to a fused multilayer perceptron (MLP) to improve model performance.
why_it_matters_zh: 了解 PyTorch 的性能剖析和优化方法有助于开发更高效的神经网络模型，提升训练和推理速度。
why_it_matters_en: Understanding PyTorch profiling and optimization techniques helps develop more efficient neural network models, enhancing training and inference speed.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Profiling in PyTorch (Part 2): From nn.Linear to a Fused MLP. Category: tools_apps. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
